texto: The change we want is within us and shall always be within us
autor: the change we can have is in the steps we can take to realize the change we want. Take a step if you want a change!
explicacao: Citação de the change we can have is in the steps we can take to realize the change we want. Take a step if you want a change! sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The change we want is within us and shall always be within us” articula reflexao, ernest-agyemang-yeboah, within em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e reflexao.
